title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Curriculum Developer in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!
